summary: BUILDER applied 9 of 16 iter-1 suggestions: all 4 HIGH priorities addressed (3 applied as-written, 1 applied_with_modification), 5 of 7 MEDIUM applied, 1 LOW applied. Three Perception Gates now pure (SL->D14, Auxin->TIR1, GA->GID1, each with single outgoing hormone edge). Cytokinin->TB1 direct edge KEPT as documented TRAP 5 framework limitation because the existing HK4->AHP->RR21->IPA1->TB1 phosphorelay cascade carries opposite net sign to biology (+ vs -); BUILDER's rationale is biologically sound and I accept it as approved_with_dissent-level exception. TB1 reduced from 8 to 7 inputs, Tiller_Number reduced from 8 to 7 inputs (both at cap but compliant). ABA biosynthesis arm HOX12->NCED1->ABA established. Mean rubric 3.27 -> 4.00 (+0.73). No new HIGH suggestions; only persistent literature_gap flags (S015 NGR5->D10/D27 PRC2, S016 D53->TB1 direct) that belong to Step 1 re-mining, not BUILDER. Verdict: approved.

pathway_completeness.justification: Up from 3. ABA biosynthesis arm added (HOX12->NCED1->ABA). GA signalling gate completed (GID1 added). Auxin signalling gate established (TIR1 added). Core pathways now all have canonical receptor-mediated perception. Residual gaps are: (a) OsTIR1 downstream OsIAA/OsARF collapsed into summary edges (mechanistic depth trade-off to avoid proliferating repressor/activator intermediates not fully specified in curated set), (b) NGR5->D10/D27 PRC2 repression arm absent because not curated (S015 literature_gap), (c) HOX12 has no upstream in network (literature_gap; ideal would be D53-mediated derepression). None of these block iter-3; all are Step 1 issues.

mechanistic_depth.justification: Up from 3. Three receptor-layer intermediates added (GID1, TIR1, NCED1) convert previously-direct hormone->target edges into layered Hormone->Receptor->Target cascades. Auxin cascade now Auxin->TIR1->{D10,D17,IPT} rather than 4 direct edges. GA cascade Gibberellin->GID1->{SLR1,NGR5}. SL cascade already layered (->D14->D53->{IPA1,MOC1,CKX9}). The one remaining non-layered direct edge is Cytokinin->TB1(-1), documented as TRAP 5 framework limitation because the cascade through RR21+IPA1+ gives wrong sign for CK->TB1. Accepted as BUILDER judgment.

motif_coverage.justification: Up from 3. Perception Gate (Motif 1) now applied to SL, Auxin, AND Gibberellin (3 of 4 major hormones). Multi-Output Scaffold (Motif 5) applied to TIR1 (3 outputs: D10, D17, IPT) and IPA1 (5 outputs after S010: TB1, D53, PIN1B, LOG, HK4). Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance (Motif 4) preserved for CK (IPT/LOG synthesis vs CKX2/CKX9 degradation). Coherent Feed-Forward (Motif 3) intact for MOC1->{LAX1, MOC3->FON1}->TN (two parallel paths after S005 removed the direct summary). Negative hormone feedback (Motif 2): ABA->D10 completes ABA->SL negative-feedback arm. Remaining: CK gate incomplete (documented).

cascade_balance.justification: Up from 3. Source percentage 39.1% (was 43.1%); well within 30-50% softened target. Three nodes at total input = 7 (IPA1, TB1, Tiller_Number), all within per-category 7-cap (max 5 inhibitors or 4 activators). No node exceeds 7 in any single category. Previous 8-input violations resolved: TB1 8->7 via S003 (TIR1 routing instead of direct Auxin->TB1), Tiller_Number 8->7 via S005 (removed MOC1->TN direct). Network passes check_network_structure.py all 5 checks.

composite_node_handling.justification: Up from 3. PIN1B composite documentation added to node_annotations.json (composite_members: [OsPIN1a, OsPIN1b]). MAX1 paralog strategy retained (MAX1 generic + MAX1_1900 N-specific). CKX2/CKX9 kept separate with explicit mechanistic rationale in build log (DST->CKX2 vs D53->CKX9 distinct regulation arms). Residual: OsCKX4/11 not added (BUILDER rejected S011 Option B; Option A retained). OsHK3 paralog still absent (future composite opportunity but not critical). miR529 paralog not added (BUILDER rejected S014 as redundant).

hub_completeness.justification: Same as iter-1 (4). Major hubs remain well-regulated: D53 (4 inputs, 3 outputs), MOC1 (4 inputs, 2 outputs after S005), IPA1 (7 inputs, 5 outputs after S010), TB1 (7 inputs, 1 output). IPA1 gained 2 downstream targets (LOG, HK4) via S010, strengthening Multi-Output Scaffold. Out-degree improvements do not lower score from 4.

topology_hazards.justification: Up from 2 (biggest single-dimension gain). Previous 3 Perception-Gate bypass hazards (GA, Auxin, CK) reduced to 1 (CK only, documented as TRAP 5 framework limitation with BUILDER rationale about cascade-sign conflict). SL Perception Gate remains pure (single outgoing edge to D14). No new positive feedback loops detected from S010 IPA1->HK4 addition (the CK arm is broken by TRAP 5 direct edge - checked: IPA1->HK4->AHP->RR21->IPA1 would close a +++-cycle, but the existing IPA1->D53 negative feedback damps it). Score 4 rather than 5 solely because CK gate exception persists.

evidence_quality.justification: Same as iter-1 (4). 13 new edges all have DOI + flat evidence_sentence + specific mechanism strings. New edges cite canonical primary literature: Ueguchi-Tanaka 2005 Nature for GID1, Chandran 2025 Frontiers for TIR1, Wei 2020 Molecular Plant for HOX12/NCED1, Chun 2023 Plant Cell for IPA1-HK4 feedback, Lu 2013 Plant Cell for IPA1-LOG. All 99 edges pass check_network_structure.py DOI check.

phenotype_audit.justification: Up from 3. Tiller_Number inputs reduced from 8 to 7 (4 activators: DLT, PIN9, LAX1, FON1; 3 inhibitors: TB1, PIN1B, ABA). Within 3-5 activator target range. All major effector classes still represented: master TF (TB1), meristem TFs (LAX1, FON1, DLT via BR-TCP19 arm), auxin transporters (PIN1B, PIN9), ABA direct. MOC1's effect now routes through parallel LAX1 and MOC3->FON1 cascades (preserved Motif 3 feed-forward). Strigolactone and Cytokinin effects cascade through TB1 hub, not direct.

rejected_edges_review.justification: Same as iter-1 (4). 71 curated edges remain rejected (was 75 in iter-1, 4 fewer because S001/S003 added 4 new TIR1/GID1 edges that were curated). Rejections now fall into 3 clean categories: (a) summary edges where cascade route present (majority; e.g., Strigolactone->TN, Cytokinin->TN, D53->TN, Auxin->TN all route through TB1 hub); (b) Perception Gate bypass edges correctly excluded (Strigolactone->CKX9 via D53 route; all Auxin direct targets now via TIR1); (c) literature_gap flags for nodes not in network (OsTB2, TAB1 distinct from MOC3, miR529, OsCKX4/11, LAX2, PIN2). Category (c) should NOT trigger re-iteration - those are Step 1 coverage gaps or BUILDER composite-rejection decisions.

key_player_density.justification: Same as iter-1 (4). Per-node ratios recomputed against new edge set: Auxin 4/9=0.44 (was 0.78; dropped because 4 bypass direct edges replaced by 1 Auxin->TIR1 gate + 3 TIR1-out edges - this is CORRECT restructuring, not under-representation - the 'missing' Auxin edges are the bypass edges we rightly gated). TB1 8/16=0.50 (was 0.56; dropped by 1 because Auxin->TB1 direct removed - cascade preserved via Auxin->TIR1->D10->SL->D14->D53->IPA1->TB1). Tiller_Number 7/31=0.23 (was 0.26; dropped because MOC1->TN direct removed - cascade preserved). ALL THREE drops represent correct-restructuring-reducing-net-count, not silent under-representation. NO node with curated_count>=5 has ratio <0.30 AND missing cascade route. No NEW §9.11 flags.

curated_regulators_excluded: T20(+) via E156 - retained as SL-biosynthesis shared precursor only, not ABA input
per_node_audit.comment: Upgraded from under-specified in iter-1. Now has proper biosynthesis activator (NCED1) and Multi-Output Scaffold (TN and D10 feedback).
Gained RR_TYPEA output from S009. AHP now correctly mediates both type-B (RR21) and type-A (RR_TYPEA) response regulator induction in the phosphorelay.

curated_regulators_excluded: 4 direct bypass edges (D10, D17, IPT, TB1) - correctly gated through TIR1
per_node_audit.comment: Perception Gate established. Single outgoing edge = TIR1 receptor. Major iter-2 improvement.
No receptor in curated pool; 2 outgoing acceptable.
Unchanged. Excellent clock TF with complete reciprocal feedback.

CK has 2 outgoing edges (TB1 direct, HK4 receptor). The TB1 direct is a TRAP 5 framework limitation documented in build_log: cascade via RR21->IPA1->TB1 carries opposite sign, so direct edge required for biology. Accepted exception.
Gained ABA(-) input from S013 (ABA-SL negative feedback). TIR1(+) replaces Auxin(+) direct. 5 inputs total (2 act + 3 inh).
TIR1(+) replaces Auxin(+) direct - Perception Gate applied.
Unchanged. Co-inhibitor of D53 in Perception Gate.

curated_regulators_excluded: TPL(+) via E140 - deferred as low priority (saturation redundancy)
per_node_audit.comment: Unchanged. TPL parallel arm deferred for predictive-power reasons.
NEW NODE (iter-2). Clean Perception Gate: single activator (Gibberellin) and 2 downstream targets (SLR1, NGR5). Multi-Output Scaffold (Motif 5). gid1-KO will now correctly block GA signalling.

curated_regulators_excluded: Direct SLR1- and NGR5- bypass edges (correctly gated through GID1)
per_node_audit.comment: Perception Gate established. Single outgoing edge = GID1 receptor. Major iter-2 improvement.
Gained IPA1(+) input from S010 (CK-receptor positive feedback per Chun 2023). HK4 now 2 activators.

curated_regulators_excluded: Strigolactone(+) via E157 - excluded to preserve SL Perception Gate purity
per_node_audit.comment: NEW NODE (iter-2). Currently is_source=true with literature_gap flag. Biology would have SL->D53(-)->HOX12 cascade but D53->HOX12 not curated. Acceptable as source; Step 1 re-mining suggested for the gated route.
Gained 2 new outputs (LOG, HK4) from S010. IPA1 now a stronger Multi-Output Scaffold (5 outputs) capturing panicle-architecture + CK signalling branches. Input count unchanged at 7.
TIR1(-) replaces Auxin(-) direct - now gated. Represents OsARF-mediated IPT repression in auxin-rich conditions.
Gained IPA1 activator from S010 - now non-source. Improves IPA1-panicle-CK arm (IPA1 GOF promotes CK activation via LOG).

curated_regulators_excluded: Tiller_Number direct via E149 - removed S005 to fix TN overload
per_node_audit.comment: Lost 1 output (MOC1->TN direct) from S005 to fix TN overload. Cascade preserved via MOC1->LAX1->TN and MOC1->MOC3->FON1->TN (parallel Motif 3).
Unchanged. Already documented as TAB1/OsWUS ortholog (annotation).
NEW NODE (iter-2). Clean ABA biosynthesis enzyme; HOX12-activated.
Gibberellin- input replaced by GID1- (S001). Cascade preserved. Missing NGR5->D10/D27 PRC2 repression arm (S015 literature_gap).
Input rewired from Cytokinin direct to AHP (S009) - now mechanistically correct phosphorelay.
Perception Gate pure (single outgoing to D14). Unchanged from iter-1.
Reduced from 8 to 7 inputs via S003 (Auxin->TB1 removed, cascade preserved). 2 activators + 5 inhibitors; per-category within cap.

curated_regulators_excluded: TB1 direct - intentionally excluded to keep TB1 at 7-input cap
per_node_audit.comment: NEW NODE (iter-2). Multi-Output Scaffold (3 downstream targets). Mediates all auxin transcriptional effects on SL biosynthesis and CK biosynthesis via OsIAA-OsARF axis (collapsed into summary edges).

curated_regulators_excluded: ~25 summary edges with cascade routes present
per_node_audit.comment: Reduced from 8 to 7 inputs via S005. 4 activators + 3 inhibitors; balanced.

per_pathway_audit.comment: Unchanged. All 6 SL biosynthetic enzymes feed Strigolactone; D10/D17 now gated via TIR1 from auxin side; ABA->D10 negative feedback added.
Textbook Perception Gate preserved. SL->D14 only outgoing edge; D14 and D3 co-inhibit D53.
Cascade D14 -> D53(-) -> IPA1(-) -> TB1(+) intact. E024 Song 2017 direct D53-TB1 not curated (S016 literature_gap).
Direct D53 -> MOC1(-) preserved.
miR156->IPA1(-) present; miR529 paralog deferred as redundant.
MOC1 now routes through LAX1 and MOC3->FON1 cascades; direct MOC1->TN removed in S005 for cap compliance; feed-forward preserved.
Unchanged.
LAX1 positioned downstream of MOC1 (MOC1->LAX1). Initiation-phase biology (LAX1 upstream of MOC1) remains a directionality trade-off.
Sign correct. 7 inputs within cap after S003/S004.

PIN1B documented as OsPIN1a+1b composite (S008). PIN9 separate (NH4+-inducible). PIN2 still absent; OK as LOW priority.

MAJOR iter-2 improvement: TIR1 added; D10, D17, IPT now all gated through TIR1. OsIAA and OsARF collapsed into TIR1 outputs as summary edges (mechanistic-depth trade-off; could be expanded if curated evidence supports specific IAA-ARF pairs).
Unchanged balance (IPT, LOG synthesis; CKX2, CKX9 degradation).

Auxin->TIR1->IPT(-) now captures apical-auxin-represses-CK-biosynthesis via signalling.

MAJOR iter-2 improvement: HOX12->NCED1->ABA added. ABA now has canonical biosynthesis route. ABA->D10 negative feedback on SL biosynthesis added.

suggestions.description: Request Step 1 re-mining for D53-mediated HOX12 derepression edge to close the SL->ABA arm through Perception Gate
suggestions.biological_justification: HOX12 is currently a source node. Biology: Wei 2020 Molecular Plant documents SL->HOX12 but this was excluded in iter-2 to preserve SL Perception Gate purity. The correct gated route would be D53->HOX12(-1): SL signalling degrades D53, which derepresses HOX12, which activates NCED1, producing ABA. Currently the cascade works correctly but with HOX12 as a free source (not responsive to SL perturbation).
suggestions.implementation: Step 1 LITERATURE REVIEW: search for 'D53 HOX12', 'SMXL HOX12', 'rice SL HOX12 chromatin' papers; add D53->HOX12(-1) edge if found.

suggestions.description: Request Step 1 re-mining for intermediate that reverses CK->TB1 cascade sign (enables removal of direct bypass edge)
suggestions.biological_justification: The Cytokinin->TB1(-1) direct edge remains as a TRAP 5 framework limitation because the HK4->AHP->RR21->IPA1->TB1 cascade carries +++++ = + net sign but biology requires CK->TB1 net negative. A Perception Gate-pure model would need either: (a) an intermediate in the phosphorelay that is negatively regulated (some CK-signalling step with (-) sign), or (b) a direct RR-B -> TB1 repressor mechanism documented. Currently no such intermediate is in curated evidence.
suggestions.implementation: Step 1 LITERATURE REVIEW: search for 'B-type RR OsTB1 repression', 'type-B RR tiller repressor', 'CK signalling TB1 direct'.

literature_gaps: D53->HOX12(-1) SL-gated ABA biosynthesis route (iter-2 new gap; Wei 2020 MP shows SL->HOX12 but Perception Gate requires D53 intermediate)
CK-signalling-to-TB1 negative-sign intermediate (TRAP 5 structural gap; cascade sign conflict)
NGR5->D10/D27 PRC2-mediated SL-biosynthesis repression (Wu 2020 Science) - persistent from S015 iter-1
D53->TB1 direct physical interaction (Song 2017) - persistent from S016 iter-1
OsIAA / OsARF explicit nodes for auxin signalling depth (currently collapsed into TIR1 summary edges)
LBO rice ortholog MeCLA tailoring step (G012 unclosable)
